title: Manufacturing Engineer - ITC Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - ITC Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
ITC Limited has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!
